Stop.command: npm run test; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Error 'Tests failed. Coverage is required.'; exit 2 }
npm run lint; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Error 'Linting failed. Please fix the issues.'; exit 2 }
npm run cpd; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Error 'CPD check failed. Please fix the issues.'; exit 2 }
